member.name: P:GTA.Math.Vector2.Item(System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets or sets the component at the specified index.
member.value: The value of the X or Y component, depending on the index.
member.param: The index of the component to access. Use 0 for the X component and 1 for the Y component.
member.returns: The value of the component at the specified index.
member.exception:
Thrown when the
is out of the range [0, 1].
